name: Japan Hospice Holdings Inc.
summary: Japan Hospice Holdings Inc. engages in hospice housing and home care businesses in Japan. The company offers care services at hospice housing for patients with terminal cancer and intractable diseases; and home-visit nursing services. It also provides home care services, which supports medical care, including physical care and life support, as well as offers day and nursing multi-function home care services. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
